models.name: Item
models.doc: One streamed record — a flat scalar DTO the `items` stream yields.

interfaces.name: Store
interfaces.doc: An open demo store. Exercises one op of every shape the Java backend projects.

ops.name: open
ops.doc: Open the store with a numeric seed — the stateful ctor (`init`/`free`).

ops.name: version
ops.doc:
The store version — a synchronous, **infallible** op (bare `String`
return, no error seam; a direct blocking native on the Java side).

ops.name: checked
ops.doc:
Look up a key — a synchronous but **fallible** op (`Result<i64>`), so the
JNI `RuntimeException` throw seam is exercised on the `Err` path.

ops.name: count
ops.doc:
Count matches for a prefix — an `#[fluessig(async)]` op, projected as a
`CompletableFuture<Long>` wrapping the blocking native.

ops.name: items
ops.doc:
Stream every item — the stream plane; bindgen maps it to a Java poll
cursor (`Items` with `Optional<Item> next()`).

interfaces.name: Ticker
interfaces.doc:
A stateful ticker that fires registered listeners with an incrementing
counter. `on_tick` is a `Shape::Subscription` op — it REGISTERS a host
callback (a Java `Consumer<Integer>`) and hands back an owning `Subscription`
handle whose unsubscribe()/close() removes the listener; `tick` fires every
live listener. This is the callback + subscription slice's Java round-trip proof.

ops.name: new
ops.doc: Open a fresh ticker with no listeners and the counter at 0.

ops.name: on_tick
ops.doc:
Register `listener` to be called on every `tick`; returns a Subscription
handle that removes the listener when unsubscribed or closed.

ops.name: tick
ops.doc:
Fire every live listener with the current counter value, then increment it
(infallible — registration/firing never fails).
